info.name: Culture Cards LLC - Complete Verified APIs
info.description: Enterprise-grade verified Postman collection for Culture Cards LLC containing all active route handlers: Auth onboarding, Profiles, Messages, Chats, Product catalog, Agora Live streams, Escrow Barter swaps, Order tracking, Notifications, Support, Category, Favourite, Location, Public, and Payments.

item.name: Auth Module
item.description: User onboarding, multi-role registration, session management, secure custom/OAuth logins, verification, and credentials management.

item.name: User Profile Module
item.description: User profiles details fetch, updates, role switches, account deactivations, and administrative user controls.

item.name: Chat Module
item.description: Establish real-time communication channels between users, professionals, and support/admin staff.

item.name: Message Module
item.description: Send individual chat messages (including attachments) and retrieve messages inside rooms.

item.name: Product Module

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Pikachu Illustrator Holographic 1998",
  "description": "PSA Graded Mint condition 9. Ultra collectible.",
  "images": ["https://example.com/pikachu.jpg"],
  "category": "TCG",
  "condition": "Mint",
  "estValue": 450000,
  "buyNowPrice": 450000,
  "allowTrade": true,
  "sellerId": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439011"
}

item.description: Create and manage product listings, details page, listings queries, category filters, and trade allowances.

item.name: Auction Module
item.description: Establish real-time interactive audio/video Agora streams, create stream schedules, add products to live bids, and cast secure bids.

item.name: Trade Module
item.description: Propose barter exchanges of products (item-for-item swaps), get trade offer history, and accept/decline transactions securely.

item.name: Order Module
item.description: Handle e-commerce buy-now orders, calculate shipping/tax fees, track shipment checkpoint logs, and trace order journeys.

item.name: Notification Module
item.description: Send alerts, check personal notification histories, fetch count analytics, and perform read/archive/delete events.

item.name: Subscription Module

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Professional Collector Monthly",
  "amount": 1999,
  "interval": "month",
  "description": "Full access to live streams, zero barter fees, and advanced analytics.",
  "features": ["live_streams", "zero_barter_fees", "unlimited_listings"]
}

item.description: Manage Stripe premium pricing subscription plans, available tiers, client checkout sessions, usage analytics, trial eligibilities, and pauses/resumptions.

item.name: Category Module
item.description: Establish classification segments for listing cards, popular highlights, and specific subcategories configurations.

item.name: Favourite Module
item.description: Add, remove, and manage cards/products to personalized bookmark lists.

item.name: Location Module
item.description: Search address suggestions, fetch geolocation coordinates, and resolve postal regions.

item.name: Payment Module
item.description: Handle payment method registrations, Setup Intents, Stripe checkout sessions verification, custom payment intents, ephemeral keys, invoices generation, and refunds.

item.name: Review Module
item.description: Leave card listings and user ratings/reviews, query feedback by booking or provider, update or delete entries.

item.name: Public Module
item.description: Access public content types (such as Privacy Policies or T&C), issue contact form entries, and construct dynamic FAQS lists.

item.name: Support Module
item.description: Establish ticket creation for user customer services support, administrative views, state patches, and resolution details.

item.name: Upload Module
item.description: Acquire AWS S3 secure signed URLs to directly push custom media files without exposing raw credentials.

item.name: Dashboard Module
item.description: Enterprise-grade real-time metrics, analytics, live audits, and administrative dashboard controllers.
